creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=devel&portname=simgear
SimGear still hasn't been built, could you please just install
SimGear-1.9.1 from source?
That won't take long time.

And I want to chage the dependency on osg to
osg-devel>=2.7.9:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/osg-devel
after amdmi3 made the osg-devel port.

Thanks
